arts.ttl: Luke McCowan declares Celtic believe they CAN beat Bayern Munich as he issues UEFA plea before Allianz dream
arts.sum: McCowan says there's no point in Celtic turning up against Vincent Kompany's side in the Champions League if they don't think they can win

arts.ttl: ‘It’s unreal’ – McCowan relishes Celtic’s Champions League date with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Luke McCowan has went from the Scottish Championship to the Champions League knockouts within four years.

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney alternative hands Celtic major transfer boost as Luis Palma breaks silence on loan exit
arts.sum: Manchester United full back Tyrell Malacia - who has been touted as a potential Hoops target - has reportedly seen a move to Benfica fall through

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough in talks to sign Aston Villa winger as Michael Carrick's side also look to beat Celtic to former Manchester City star
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Middlesbrough are in talks to sign a winger from Aston Villa. Michael Carrick's side are also looking to beat Celtic to a former Manchester City star.

arts.ttl: 9 strikers linked with Celtic and where they stand as Iheanacho twist sees Kyogo successor search go to the wire
arts.sum: The striker search is ramping up a gear with the transfer window entering it's final hours

arts.ttl: Matt O'Riley has Celtic fans all saying same thing after Brighton mauled by Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Celtic fans react to Matt O’Riley and say ‘grass not greener’ Matt O’Riley made the move to Brighton over the summer in a money-spinning move.

arts.ttl: Manchester City and Crystal Palace strikers join Motherwell on loan ahead of Celtic clash
arts.sum: The Steelmen have swooped ahead of a big clash at Fir Park tomorrow

arts.ttl: What Brendan Rodgers said about 'phenomenal' £25m Kelechi Iheanacho, Celtic boss can get best from striker
arts.sum: Celtic are pushing for a loan deal for Sevilla striker Kelechi Iheanacho this window. Iheanacho is wanted by Celts on an initial six-month loan deal with a future purchase option on the table and a move for the legitimate Premier League goal scorer would be good business.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Kelechi Iheanacho to Celtic, Patrick Wimmer to Leicester City, Marcus Edwards to Burnley
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Kelechi Iheanacho to Celtic, Patrick Wimmer to Leicester City and Marcus Edwards to Burnley.

arts.ttl: English club's nod to 'giants' Celtic as they snap up former Hoops star
arts.sum: The 32-year-old enjoyed an excellent time at Parkhead before he left for Southampton in 2018 for around £7million but he has since played with Vancouver Whitecaps alongside Ryan Gauld before moving back to England. “The Owls have signed the vastly experienced international Stuart Armstrong from Major League Soccer side Vancouver Whitecaps,” their Armstrong post read.
